step1.title: Family member list
step1.description: Everyone in your household appears here.

step3.title: Add yourself
step3.description: Not on the list? Add your name below.

step1.title: Add Recipe
step1.description: Tap here to start capturing a new recipe.

step2.title: Take a photo
step2.description: Use your camera or select from your gallery.

step4.title: Select cooked recipe photo
step4.description: Pick the photo that best shows the finished dish.

step5.title: Rate the recipe
step5.description: How was it? Pick an emoji.

step9.title: Add another?
step9.description: Or head back to your collection.
